title: Notes
noNotesYet: You haven't joined any notes yet.
publicNotesPlaceholder: A list of notes anyone can join and related UI will be implemented after spec is finalized.
noteNotFoundOrNoAccess: Note not found or you don't have permission to view it.
noPermissionToEdit: You don't have permission to change settings.
deleteSectionDescription: Deleting this note will revoke all access to it.
deleteConfirmDescription: 「{{title}}」 will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
pageCopyToNoteFailed: Failed to copy page to note
pageCopyToPersonalFailed: Failed to import to personal pages
noPermissionToManageMembers: You don't have permission to manage members.
editPermission: Who can post to this note?
editPermissionAnyLoggedInWarningDescript: With this option, every authenticated user in this app who can open this note can edit its pages. Use it only if you intend open collaboration.
editPermissionHelpOwnerOnly: Only you (the owner) can add or edit pages.
editPermissionHelpMembersEditors: You and members with the editor role can add or edit pages.
editPermissionHelpAnyLoggedIn: Any signed-in user who can view this note (public or unlisted link) can edit pages.
publicAnyLoggedInConfirmTitle: Save with open collaboration for all signed-in users?
publicAnyLoggedInConfirmDescription: With this visibility and edit permission, every signed-in user who can open this note (public or unlisted link) can edit it. Continue?
publicAnyLoggedInCreateConfirmTitle: Create a note with open collaboration for all signed-in users?
publicAnyLoggedInCreateConfirmDescriptio: With this visibility and edit permission, every signed-in user who can open this note (public or unlisted link) can edit it. Continue?
loginToViewMyNotes: Sign in to view your notes
inviteLinksPhase3Hint: Phase 3 only supports viewer-role share links.
inviteLinksPhase5Hint: Share links can be issued as viewer or editor. Editor links are capped at 3 active links per note.
inviteLinksEditorUnavailableOwnerOnly: This note's edit permission is set to owner-only, so editor links cannot be issued.
inviteLinksEditorConfirmDescription: This link grants edit permission. Be careful not to share it with anyone who shouldn't have access.
inviteLinkCreatedAndCopied: Share link created and copied to clipboard
shareModalDescription: Invite members, create share links, or change who can view this note.
shareReadOnlyNotice: You can view these settings but only the owner can change them.
shareVisibilityDescriptionPrivate: Only you and invited members can access this note.
shareVisibilityDescriptionUnlisted: Anyone with the link can view; the note is not listed publicly.
shareVisibilityDescriptionPublic: Anyone can discover and view this note.
shareVisibilityDescriptionRestricted: Only invited members can view; the link alone does not grant access.
shareUnlistedUrlHint: Copy this link to share with viewers:
domainTabDescription: Anyone signed in with an email at one of these domains automatically gets access. Free webmail providers (gmail.com, outlook.com, …) are not accepted.
domainTabRuleSummary: Anyone with an email at {{domain}} can join as {{role}}.
domainTabUnverifiedHint: Domain ownership is not yet verified. DNS-TXT verification will arrive in a future release.
domainTabEditorWarning: This rule grants edit permission to everyone at this domain. Only do this for closed organisations.
domainTabCreateFailedFreeEmail: {{domain}} is a free webmail provider and cannot be used as a domain rule.
